items.description: Returns the list of successful commitment line items that were created for the Bill Scenario.

errors.description: Returns the list of errors reason and the commitment item keys that cannot be created in the Bill Scenario.

key.description: The key of the successfully created entry. This can be any valid string. This key is useful to identify errors associated with any commitment entry as any error is returned with this key.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the created commitment modification.

group.description: The group identifier for the created commitment modification.

usageAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the created commitment modification.

commitmentAction.description: The specific commitment action that was taken.

addReservedInstanceAction.description: Action to add a Reserved Instance to the scenario.

reservedInstancesOfferingId.description: The ID of the Reserved Instance offering to add. For more information, see DescribeReservedInstancesOfferings.

instanceCount.description: The number of instances to add for this Reserved Instance offering.

addSavingsPlanAction.description: Action to add a Savings Plan to the scenario.

savingsPlanOfferingId.description: The ID of the Savings Plan offering to add. For more information, see DescribeSavingsPlansOfferings.

commitment.description: The hourly commitment, in the same currency of the savingsPlanOfferingId. This is a value between 0.001 and 1 million. You cannot specify more than five digits after the decimal point.

negateReservedInstanceAction.description: Action to remove a Reserved Instance from the scenario.

reservedInstancesId.description: The ID of the Reserved Instance to remove.

negateSavingsPlanAction.description: Action to remove a Savings Plan from the scenario.

savingsPlanId.description: The ID of the Savings Plan to remove.

id.description: The unique identifier of your newly created Bill estimate.

name.description: The name of your newly created Bill estimate.

status.description: The status of your newly created Bill estimate. Bill estimate creation can take anywhere between 8 to 12 hours. The status will allow you to identify when the Bill estimate is complete or has failed.

failureMessage.description: This attribute provides the reason if a Bill estimate result generation fails.

billInterval.description: The bill month start and end timestamp that was used to create the Bill estimate. This is set to the last complete anniversary bill month start and end timestamp.

costSummary.description: Returns summary-level cost information once a Bill estimate is successfully generated. This summary includes: 1) the total cost difference, showing the pre-tax cost change for the consolidated billing family between the completed anniversary bill and the estimated bill, and 2) total cost differences per service, detailing the pre-tax cost of each service, comparing the completed anniversary bill to the estimated bill on a per-service basis.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the Bill estimate create process was started (not when it successfully completed or failed).

expiresAt.description: The timestamp of when the Bill estimate will expire. A Bill estimate becomes inaccessible after expiration.

groupSharingPreference.description: The setting for the reserved instance and savings plan group sharing used in this estimate.

costCategoryGroupSharingPreferenceArn.description: The arn of the cost category used in the reserved and prioritized group sharing.

costCategoryGroupSharingPreferenceEffect.description: Timestamp of the effective date of the cost category used in the group sharing settings.

usageAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the usage.

billInterval.description: The time interval for the historical usage data.

start.description: The start date and time of the interval.

end.description: The end date and time of the interval.

filterExpression.description: An optional filter expression to apply to the historical usage data.

and.description: A list of expressions to be combined with AND logic.

or.description: A list of expressions to be combined with OR logic.

and.description: A list of expressions to be combined with AND logic.

or.description: A list of expressions to be combined with OR logic.

dimensions.description: Filters based on dimensions (e.g., service, operation).

key.description: The key or attribute to filter on.

matchOptions.description: The match options for the filter (e.g., equals, contains).

key.description: The key or attribute to filter on.

matchOptions.description: The match options for the filter (e.g., equals, contains).

matchOptions.description: The match options for the filter (e.g., equals, contains).

id.description: The unique identifier of the updated bill estimate.

name.description: The updated name of the bill estimate.

status.description: The current status of the updated bill estimate.

failureMessage.description: An error message if the bill estimate update failed.

billInterval.description: The time period covered by the updated bill estimate.

costSummary.description: A summary of the updated estimated costs.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the bill estimate was originally created.

expiresAt.description: The updated expiration timestamp for the bill estimate.

groupSharingPreference.description: The setting for the reserved instance and savings plan group sharing used in this estimate.

costCategoryGroupSharingPreferenceArn.description: The arn of the cost category used in the reserved and prioritized group sharing.

costCategoryGroupSharingPreferenceEffect.description: Timestamp of the effective date of the cost category used in the group sharing settings.

start.description: The start date and time of the interval.

end.description: The end date and time of the interval.

id.description: The unique identifier of the updated bill scenario.

name.description: The updated name of the bill scenario.

billInterval.description: The time period covered by the updated bill scenario.

status.description: The current status of the updated bill scenario.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the bill scenario was originally created.

expiresAt.description: The updated expiration timestamp for the bill scenario.

failureMessage.description: An error message if the bill scenario update failed.

groupSharingPreference.description: The setting for the reserved instance and savings plan group sharing used in this estimate.

costCategoryGroupSharingPreferenceArn.description: The arn of the cost category used in the reserved and prioritized group sharing.

start.description: The start date and time of the interval.

end.description: The end date and time of the interval.

id.description: The unique identifier of the updated workload estimate.

name.description: The updated name of the workload estimate.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the workload estimate was originally created.

expiresAt.description: The updated expiration timestamp for the workload estimate.

rateType.description: The type of pricing rates used for the updated estimate.

rateTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the pricing rates used for the updated estimate.

status.description: The current status of the updated workload estimate.

totalCost.description: The updated total estimated cost for the workload.

costCurrency.description: The currency of the updated estimated cost.

failureMessage.description: An error message if the workload estimate update failed.
